controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - asset liability management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
Short Title and Commencement
1 These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - asset liability management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect from the date of issue
controls.control_description: 2 These Directions shall come into effect from the date of issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect from the date of issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
Applicability
3 These Directions shall be applicable to Rural Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean state co-operative banks and central co-operative banks, as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981
controls.control_description:
In this context, rural co-operative banks shall mean State Co-operative Banks
and Central Co-operative Banks, as defined in the National Bank for Agriculture
and Rural Development Act, 1981.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean state co-operative banks and central co-operative banks, as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'defeasance period' means time taken to liquidate the investment in securities on the basis of liquidity
controls.control_description:
Definitions
4 In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein
shall bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Defeasance period' means time taken to liquidate the investment in
securities on the basis of liquidity in the secondary market.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'defeasance period' means time taken to liquidate the investment in securities on the basis of liquidity

controls.control_objective: To ensure customers exercising their options (premature closure of deposits and prepayment of loans and advances)
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Embedded Options' means customers exercising their options
(premature closure of deposits and prepayment of loans and advances).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to customers exercising their options (premature closure of deposits and prepayment of loans and advances)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the br act, the rbi act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification
controls.control_description:
5 All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the BR Act, the RBI Act, rules / regulations
made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as
used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the br act, the rbi act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification

controls.control_objective: To ensure have an overall responsibility for risk management and shall decide the risk management policy of a bank including asset liability management (alm) po
controls.control_description:
Responsibilities of the Board
6 The Board shall have an overall responsibility for risk management and shall
decide the risk management policy of a bank including Asset Liability
Management (ALM) Policy, and set limits for liquidity, interest rate, and equity
price risks.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have an overall responsibility for risk management and shall decide the risk management policy of a bank including asset liability management (alm) po

controls.control_objective: To ensure oversee the implementation of the alm system and review its functioning periodically
controls.control_description:
7 The Management Committee of the Board or any other specific Committee
constituted by the Board shall oversee the implementation of the ALM system
and review its functioning periodically.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to oversee the implementation of the alm system and review its functioning periodically

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for providing adequate information to the stakeholders
controls.control_description:
8 The Board shall be responsible for providing adequate information to the
stakeholders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for providing adequate information to the stakeholders

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve internal prudential limits for cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets of the structural liquidity statement (sls) for m
controls.control_description:
Board approved policies, limits, and reviews
9 The Board / Management Committee shall approve internal prudential limits for
cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets of the structural
liquidity statement (SLS) for monitoring by a bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve internal prudential limits for cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets of the structural liquidity statement (sls) for m

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the bank operates within the limits / parameters set by the board
controls.control_description:
10 The business and risk management strategy of the bank should ensure that the
bank operates within the limits / parameters set by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the bank operates within the limits / parameters set by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the volume, composition, holding / defeasance period, and cut-loss limits for the investments in the 'current category'
controls.control_description:
11 The Board / Asset-Liability Management Committee (ALCO) of a bank shall
approve the volume, composition, holding / defeasance period, and cut-loss
limits for the investments in the 'current category'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the volume, composition, holding / defeasance period, and cut-loss limits for the investments in the 'current category'

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve prudential limits on individual gaps in interest rate sensitivity (irs)
controls.control_description:
12 The Board / Management Committee of a bank shall approve prudential limits
on individual gaps in Interest Rate Sensitivity (IRS).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve prudential limits on individual gaps in interest rate sensitivity (irs)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the total assets, earning assets, or equity
controls.control_description:
The prudential limits shall
be based on the Total Assets, Earning Assets, or Equity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on the total assets, earning assets, or equity

controls.control_objective: To ensure also approve a prudent level of earnings at risk (ear) or net interest margin (nim)
controls.control_description:
The Board /
Management Committee of bank shall also approve a prudent level of Earnings
at Risk (EaR) or Net Interest Margin (NIM).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also approve a prudent level of earnings at risk (ear) or net interest margin (nim)

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the estimates of behavioural pattern, embedded options, rolls-in and rolls-out, etc
controls.control_description:
13 The Board / ALCO of bank shall approve the estimates of behavioural pattern,
embedded options, rolls-in and rolls-out, etc., of various components of assets
and liabilities on the basis of past data / empirical studies for classification of
the same in the appropriate time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the estimates of behavioural pattern, embedded options, rolls-in and rolls-out, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish an alm system that offers a comprehensive and dynamic framework for measuring, monitoring, and managing liquidity, interest rate, currency /
controls.control_description:
Introduction
14 A bank shall establish an ALM system that offers a comprehensive and
dynamic framework for measuring, monitoring, and managing liquidity, interest
rate, currency / foreign exchange, and equity price risks.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to establish an alm system that offers a comprehensive and dynamic framework for measuring, monitoring, and managing liquidity, interest rate, currency /

controls.control_objective: To ensure be closely aligned with the bank's business strategy
controls.control_description:
The ALM framework
shall be closely aligned with the bank's business strategy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be closely aligned with the bank's business strategy

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the alm function to promote risk management discipline by making informed business decisions that account for inherent risks
controls.control_description:
15 The bank shall use the ALM function to promote risk management discipline by
making informed business decisions that account for inherent risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the alm function to promote risk management discipline by making informed business decisions that account for inherent risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be integrated, addressing asset-liability mix and maturity structure simultaneously
controls.control_description:
ALM
decisions shall be integrated, addressing asset-liability mix and maturity
structure simultaneously.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be integrated, addressing asset-liability mix and maturity structure simultaneously

controls.control_objective: To ensure be developed into a strategic tool for a bank's management, clearly specifying the risk policies and tolerance limits
controls.control_description:
16 The ALM system shall be developed into a strategic tool for a bank's
management, clearly specifying the risk policies and tolerance limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be developed into a strategic tool for a bank's management, clearly specifying the risk policies and tolerance limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the alm process encompasses the following: (1) planning, directing and controlling the flow, mix, cost, and yield of the consolidated fund
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the alm process encompasses the following: (1) planning, directing and controlling the flow, mix, cost, and yield of the consolidated fund

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement the alm system on the following three pillars: (1) alm information systems
controls.control_description:
18 A bank shall implement the ALM system on the following three pillars:
(1) ALM Information Systems;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement the alm system on the following three pillars: (1) alm information systems

controls.control_objective: To ensure align its alm operations within the risk policies and tolerance limits approved by the board
controls.control_description:
ALM Information Systems
19 A bank shall align its ALM operations within the risk policies and tolerance limits
approved by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to align its alm operations within the risk policies and tolerance limits approved by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a robust management information system (mis) to facilitate timely and accurate data collection
controls.control_description:
The Top Management of the bank shall put in place a
robust Management Information System (MIS) to facilitate timely and accurate
data collection.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a robust management information system (mis) to facilitate timely and accurate data collection

controls.control_objective: To ensure evolve the mis to better capture the risk parameters, measurement of identified risks, and their management
controls.control_description:
A bank shall evolve the MIS to better capture the risk
parameters, measurement of identified risks, and their management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to evolve the mis to better capture the risk parameters, measurement of identified risks, and their management

controls.control_objective: To ensure supplement its balance sheet, income and cash flow statements with risk disclosures to promote efficient resource allocation, enforce financial discip
controls.control_description:
20 A bank shall supplement its balance sheet, income and cash flow statements
with risk disclosures to promote efficient resource allocation, enforce financial
discipline, enhance transparency and reflect its true financial health.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to supplement its balance sheet, income and cash flow statements with risk disclosures to promote efficient resource allocation, enforce financial discip

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish an alco comprising its top management, including the ceo
controls.control_description:
ALM Organization
21 A bank shall establish an ALCO comprising its Top Management, including the
CEO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish an alco comprising its top management, including the ceo

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet regularly, ensure compliance with board-approved limits, and align asset-liability strategies with budget and risk objectives
controls.control_description:
The ALCO shall meet regularly, ensure compliance with Board-approved
limits, and align asset-liability strategies with budget and risk objectives.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet regularly, ensure compliance with board-approved limits, and align asset-liability strategies with budget and risk objectives

controls.control_objective: To ensure depend on the size of the bank's business mix and organisational complexity
controls.control_description:
22 The size (number of members) of ALCO shall depend on the size of the bank's
business mix and organisational complexity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to depend on the size of the bank's business mix and organisational complexity

controls.control_objective: To ensure head the alco, and heads of investment, credit and strategy, resources management, treasury and risk management can be members of the alco, along with
controls.control_description:
The CEO / MD or General
Manager shall head the ALCO, and Heads of Investment, Credit and Strategy,
Resources Management, Treasury and Risk Management can be members of
the ALCO, along with other members, as deemed suitable.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to head the alco, and heads of investment, credit and strategy, resources management, treasury and risk management can be members of the alco, along with

controls.control_objective: To ensure have sub-committees and support groups
controls.control_description:
A bank, at its discretion, may have Sub-Committees and
Support Groups.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have sub-committees and support groups

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for analysing, monitoring, and reporting the risk profiles to the alco
controls.control_description:
23 The ALM Support Group consisting of operating staff shall be responsible for
analysing, monitoring, and reporting the risk profiles to the ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for analysing, monitoring, and reporting the risk profiles to the alco

controls.control_objective: To ensure also prepare forecasts (simulations) showing the effects of various possible changes in market conditions related to the balance sheet and recommend t
controls.control_description:
The staff
shall also prepare forecasts (simulations) showing the effects of various
possible changes in market conditions related to the balance sheet and
recommend the action needed to adhere to prescribed internal limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also prepare forecasts (simulations) showing the effects of various possible changes in market conditions related to the balance sheet and recommend t

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for balance sheet planning from risk-return perspective, including the strategic management of interest rate and liquidity risks
controls.control_description:
24 The ALCO shall be responsible for balance sheet planning from risk-return
perspective, including the strategic management of interest rate and liquidity
risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for balance sheet planning from risk-return perspective, including the strategic management of interest rate and liquidity risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure define the roles and responsibilities of its alco, as also the decisions to be taken by it
controls.control_description:
A bank shall define the roles and responsibilities of its ALCO, as also the
decisions to be taken by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to define the roles and responsibilities of its alco, as also the decisions to be taken by it

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that it operates within the limits / parameters set by the board
controls.control_description:
A bank's business and risk management strategy
shall ensure that it operates within the limits / parameters set by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that it operates within the limits / parameters set by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure include the following: <image> (1) review of progress in implementation of the decisions made in the previous meetings
controls.control_description:
25 The agenda / typical business of ALCO shall include the following:
<image>
(1) Review of progress in implementation of the decisions made in the
previous meetings;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include the following: <image> (1) review of progress in implementation of the decisions made in the previous meetings

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate such other issues which, in its opinion, need to be discussed in the committee based on the local conditions
controls.control_description:
A bank shall
incorporate such other issues which, in its opinion, need to be discussed in the
Committee based on the local conditions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to incorporate such other issues which, in its opinion, need to be discussed in the committee based on the local conditions

controls.control_objective: To ensure take a view on whether all the agenda items are required to be discussed in all the meetings, and agenda can be fixed for each meeting depending upon
controls.control_description:
A bank shall take a view on whether
all the agenda items are required to be discussed in all the meetings, and
agenda can be fixed for each meeting depending upon the emergent needs
and priority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take a view on whether all the agenda items are required to be discussed in all the meetings, and agenda can be fixed for each meeting depending upon

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide the frequency for holding its alco meetings, as also take steps for capacity building of the nodal officer and other officers involved in alm f
controls.control_description:
27 A bank shall decide the frequency for holding its ALCO meetings, as also take
steps for capacity building of the Nodal Officer and other officers involved in
ALM functions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to decide the frequency for holding its alco meetings, as also take steps for capacity building of the nodal officer and other officers involved in alm f

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the alm process covers the following functional areas with focus on liquidity and interest rate risks: (1) liquidity risk management
controls.control_description:
ALM Process
28 The bank shall ensure that the ALM process covers the following functional
areas with focus on liquidity and interest rate risks:
(1) Liquidity risk management;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the alm process covers the following functional areas with focus on liquidity and interest rate risks: (1) liquidity risk management

controls.control_objective: To ensure measure its liquidity position on an ongoing basis, as also evaluate liquidity requirements under different assumptions by putting in place a system f
controls.control_description:
Introduction
29 A bank's management shall measure its liquidity position on an ongoing basis,
as also evaluate liquidity requirements under different assumptions by putting in
place a system for ascertaining its cash flow mismatches periodically.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to measure its liquidity position on an ongoing basis, as also evaluate liquidity requirements under different assumptions by putting in place a system f

controls.control_objective: To ensure use maturity ladder tool to measure and manage net funding requirements
controls.control_description:
Maturity / Cash flow mismatches 30 A bank shall use maturity ladder tool to measure and manage net funding
requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use maturity ladder tool to measure and manage net funding requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the structural liquidity statement (sls) at
controls.control_description: A bank shall use the Structural Liquidity Statement (SLS) at
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the structural liquidity statement (sls) at

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the maturity profile as given in annex-iv for measuring the future cash flows in different time buckets
controls.control_description:
31 A bank shall use the Maturity Profile as given in Annex-IV for measuring the
future cash flows in different time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the maturity profile as given in annex-iv for measuring the future cash flows in different time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed as under: (1) 1 to 14 days
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed as under: (1) 1 to 14 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure place all cash inflows and outflows in the maturity ladder according to the expected timing of cash flows
controls.control_description:
32 The SLS shall place all cash inflows and outflows in the maturity ladder
according to the expected timing of cash flows.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to place all cash inflows and outflows in the maturity ladder according to the expected timing of cash flows

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a cash outflow, while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow
controls.control_description:
A maturing liability shall be a
cash outflow, while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a cash outflow, while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow

controls.control_objective: To ensure make appropriate assumptions according to its asset-liability profile while determining the likely cash inflows and outflows
controls.control_description:
A bank shall make
appropriate assumptions according to its asset-liability profile while determining
the likely cash inflows and outflows.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make appropriate assumptions according to its asset-liability profile while determining the likely cash inflows and outflows

controls.control_objective: To ensure also take into account all relevant factors, based on its asset-liability base, and nature of business while determining the tolerance levels
controls.control_description:
A bank shall also take into account all
relevant factors, based on its asset-liability base, and nature of business while
determining the tolerance levels.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also take into account all relevant factors, based on its asset-liability base, and nature of business while determining the tolerance levels

controls.control_objective: To ensure primarily focus on the short-term mismatches (1-14 days and 15- 28 days)
controls.control_description:
33 A bank shall primarily focus on the short-term mismatches (1-14 days and 15-
28 days).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to primarily focus on the short-term mismatches (1-14 days and 15- 28 days)

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 20 per cent of the cash outflows in the respective time buckets
controls.control_description:
The mismatches (negative gap) in the 1-14 days and 15-28 days
buckets shall not exceed 20 per cent of the cash outflows in the respective time
buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 20 per cent of the cash outflows in the respective time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor its cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets by establishing internal prudential limits with the approval of the board /
controls.control_description:
<image>
34 A bank shall monitor its cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time
buckets by establishing internal prudential limits with the approval of the Board /
Management Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor its cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets by establishing internal prudential limits with the approval of the board /

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under respective maturity buckets, corresponding to the residual maturity
controls.control_description:
35 A bank's investment in SLR securities and other investments in permanent
category shall be shown under respective maturity buckets, corresponding to
the residual maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under respective maturity buckets, corresponding to the residual maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to place such trading securities into 1-14 days, 15-28 days, and 29-90 days buckets on the basis of the defeasance periods
controls.control_description:
36 A bank maintaining securities in the 'current' category, distinct from investments
made for complying with the Statutory Reserve requirements and for retaining
relationship with customers, shall be permitted to place such trading securities
into 1-14 days, 15-28 days, and 29-90 days buckets on the basis of the
defeasance periods, provided following conditions are met:
(1) Composition and value are clearly defined;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to place such trading securities into 1-14 days, 15-28 days, and 29-90 days buckets on the basis of the defeasance periods

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the volume, composition, holding / defeasance period and cut-loss limits of the 'current category' investments
controls.control_description:
37 The Board / ALCO of a bank shall approve the volume, composition, holding /
defeasance period and cut-loss limits of the 'current category' investments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the volume, composition, holding / defeasance period and cut-loss limits of the 'current category' investments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be forwarded to the department of supervision, nabard, and financial inclusion and development department (fidd), rbi under advice to the respective r
controls.control_description:
A
copy of the approved policy note shall be forwarded to the Department of
Supervision, NABARD, and Financial Inclusion and Development Department
(FIDD), RBI under advice to the respective Regional Office.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be forwarded to the department of supervision, nabard, and financial inclusion and development department (fidd), rbi under advice to the respective r

controls.control_objective: To ensure estimate its short-term liquidity profiles on the basis of business projections and other commitments for planning purposes, to monitor its short- ter
controls.control_description:
Dynamic Liquidity Assessment
38 A bank shall estimate its short-term liquidity profiles on the basis of business
projections and other commitments for planning purposes, to monitor its short-
term liquidity on a dynamic basis over a time horizon spanning from 1-90 days,
as per format of Statement of Dynamic Liquidity provided in Annex-II.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to estimate its short-term liquidity profiles on the basis of business projections and other commitments for planning purposes, to monitor its short- ter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to access the liquidity adjustment facility (laf) and the marginal standing facility (msf)
controls.control_description:
Scheduled StCB
39 A Scheduled State Cooperative Bank (StCB) which is Core Banking Solution
(CBS) enabled and maintains a Capital to Risk-weighted Assets Ratio (CRAR)
<image>
of at least 9 per cent shall be eligible to access the Liquidity Adjustment Facility
(LAF) and the Marginal Standing Facility (MSF).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to access the liquidity adjustment facility (laf) and the marginal standing facility (msf)

controls.control_objective: To ensure communicate to the fmod, the list of scheduled stcbs eligible to participate in laf and msf ("positive list") and the list of scheduled stcbs found in
controls.control_description:
41 The Department of Regulation (DoR) shall communicate to the FMOD, the list
of Scheduled StCBs eligible to participate in LAF and MSF ("Positive List") and
the list of Scheduled StCBs found ineligible ("Negative List").
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to communicate to the fmod, the list of scheduled stcbs eligible to participate in laf and msf ("positive list") and the list of scheduled stcbs found in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed on an ongoing basis to ensure that the crar requirement is being complied with
controls.control_description:
42 The eligibility status of a Scheduled StCB in the Positive List shall be reviewed
on an ongoing basis to ensure that the CRAR requirement is being complied
with.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed on an ongoing basis to ensure that the crar requirement is being complied with

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the traditional gap analysis to measure the interest rate risk
controls.control_description:
A bank shall follow the Traditional Gap Analysis to
measure the Interest Rate Risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the traditional gap analysis to measure the interest rate risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure be measured by calculating gaps over different time intervals as at a given date, by preparing the interest rate sensitivity statement as per format g
controls.control_description:
Traditional Gap Analysis
45 The Gap or Mismatch risk shall be measured by calculating Gaps over different
time intervals as at a given date, by preparing the Interest Rate Sensitivity
Statement as per format given in Annex-III.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be measured by calculating gaps over different time intervals as at a given date, by preparing the interest rate sensitivity statement as per format g

controls.control_objective: To ensure measurement of 'gap', i
controls.control_description:
46 'Gap analysis' means measurement of 'Gap', i.e., mismatches between rate
sensitive liabilities (RSL) and rate sensitive assets (including off-balance sheet
positions) through a Gap Report generated by grouping rate sensitive liabilities,
assets and off-balance sheet positions into time buckets according to residual
maturity or next repricing period, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to measurement of 'gap', i

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the following aspects: (1) segregations of assets and liabilities into various time buckets based on residual maturity or next repricing period
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the following aspects: (1) segregations of assets and liabilities into various time buckets based on residual maturity or next repricing period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be grouped into time buckets based on residual maturity or next repricing period, whichever is earlier to prepare a gap report
controls.control_description:
Interest Rate Sensitivity Statement
48 The rate sensitive liabilities, assets, and off-balance sheet positions shall be
grouped into time buckets based on residual maturity or next repricing period,
whichever is earlier to prepare a gap report.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be grouped into time buckets based on residual maturity or next repricing period, whichever is earlier to prepare a gap report

controls.control_objective: To ensure be identified in the following time buckets
controls.control_description:
The Gaps shall be identified in the
following time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be identified in the following time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as explained in annex-v
controls.control_description:
49 The various items of rate sensitive assets (RSA), rate sensitive liabilities (RSL)
and OBS items shall be classified as explained in Annex-V.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as explained in annex-v

controls.control_objective: To ensure set prudential limits on individual gaps with the approval of the board / management committee
controls.control_description:
51 A bank shall set prudential limits on individual Gaps with the approval of the
Board / Management Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set prudential limits on individual gaps with the approval of the board / management committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the total assets, earning assets, or equity
controls.control_description:
The prudential limits shall be based on the
Total Assets, Earning Assets, or Equity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on the total assets, earning assets, or equity

controls.control_objective: To ensure also work out earnings at risk (ear), or net interest margin (nim), based on its views on interest rate movements and fix a prudent level with the app
controls.control_description:
A bank shall also work out Earnings at
Risk (EaR), or Net Interest Margin (NIM), based on its views on interest rate
movements and fix a prudent level with the approval of the Board /
Management Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also work out earnings at risk (ear), or net interest margin (nim), based on its views on interest rate movements and fix a prudent level with the app

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify the same in the appropriate time buckets
controls.control_description:
Behavioural Patterns
52 Notwithstanding guidance provided in Annex-IV and Annex-V, a bank which is
better equipped to reasonably estimate the behavioural pattern, embedded
options, rolls-in and rolls-out, etc., of various components of assets and
liabilities on the basis of past data / empirical studies shall classify the same in
the appropriate time buckets, subject to approval from the ALCO / Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify the same in the appropriate time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sent to the department of supervision, nabard and fidd, rbi under advice to the respective regional office
controls.control_description:
A
copy of the note approved by the ALCO / Board shall be sent to the Department
of Supervision, NABARD and FIDD, RBI under advice to the respective
Regional Office.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sent to the department of supervision, nabard and fidd, rbi under advice to the respective regional office

controls.control_objective: To ensure evolve suitable mechanism, supported by empirical studies and behavioral analysis to estimate the future behaviour of assets, liabilities, and off-bal
controls.control_description:
Embedded Options
53 A bank shall evolve suitable mechanism, supported by empirical studies and
behavioral analysis to estimate the future behaviour of assets, liabilities, and
off-balance sheet items to the changes in market variables and estimate the
embedded options.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to evolve suitable mechanism, supported by empirical studies and behavioral analysis to estimate the future behaviour of assets, liabilities, and off-bal

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow a well-defined 'transfer pricing system' which provides a rational framework for pricing of assets and liabilities
controls.control_description:
Transfer Price Mechanism
54 A bank shall follow a well-defined 'transfer pricing system' which provides a
rational framework for pricing of assets and liabilities.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to follow a well-defined 'transfer pricing system' which provides a rational framework for pricing of assets and liabilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that adequate financial information is disclosed to stakeholders in order to promote market discipline
controls.control_description:
Financial Reporting and Role of Auditors
55 The Board shall ensure that adequate financial information is disclosed to
stakeholders in order to promote market discipline.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that adequate financial information is disclosed to stakeholders in order to promote market discipline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be certified by the auditors, whose independence shall be ensured by the bank
controls.control_description:
The authenticity of financial
<image>
statements shall be certified by the auditors, whose independence shall be
ensured by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be certified by the auditors, whose independence shall be ensured by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure exhibit the highest standards of integrity in the conduct of their responsibilities
controls.control_description:
The auditors shall exhibit the highest standards of
integrity in the conduct of their responsibilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exhibit the highest standards of integrity in the conduct of their responsibilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the two alm returns, viz
controls.control_description:
Chapter VII - Monitoring and Reporting
56 A bank may submit the two ALM returns, viz., Structural Liquidity Statement
(SLS) and Interest Rate Sensitivity (IRS) Statement at quarterly intervals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the two alm returns, viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to relevant supervisory guidelines from nabard for submission timelines for all alm returns
controls.control_description:
Further, a bank shall
refer to relevant supervisory guidelines from NABARD for submission timelines
for all ALM returns.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to refer to relevant supervisory guidelines from nabard for submission timelines for all alm returns

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
Directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed shall continue to
remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
58 Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
Application of other laws not barred
59 The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
Interpretations
60 For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified into volatile and core portions
controls.control_description:
Outflows
Capital, Reserves and Surplus Over 5 years bucket
Demand Deposits (Current and Savings Bank Deposits)
Savings Bank and Current Deposits may be classified into volatile and core portions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified into volatile and core portions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as volatile
controls.control_description: This portion may be treated as volatile.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as volatile

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in over 1- 3 years time bucket
controls.control_description: While volatile portion can be placed in the first time bucket, i.e., 1-14 days, the core portion may be placed in over 1- 3 years time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in over 1- 3 years time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under respective residual time buckets
controls.control_description: However, the wholesale deposits (deposits over Rs.15 lakhs and inter-bank deposits) should be shown under respective residual time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under respective residual time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in 1-14 days time bucket
controls.control_description:
Inter-office Adjustments
The net credit balance may be shown in 1-14 days time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in 1-14 days time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in over 5 years time buckets
controls.control_description: guarantee fee received in advance, etc.) may be placed in over 5 years time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in over 5 years time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under 1-14 days time buckets, the statutory balances may be distributed amongst various time buckets corresponding to the maturity profile of
controls.control_description:
Balances with RBI / Public Sector Banks for CRR/ SLR purpose
While the excess balance over the required CRR / SLR may be shown under 1-14 days time buckets, the Statutory Balances may be distributed amongst various time buckets corresponding to the maturity profile of DTL with a time-lag of 28 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under 1-14 days time buckets, the statutory balances may be distributed amongst various time buckets corresponding to the maturity profile of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under over 1-3 years time bucket and the remaining balances may be shown under 1-14 days time bucket
controls.control_description: Current Account Non-withdrawable portion on account of stipulations of minimum balances may be shown under over 1-3 years time bucket and the remaining balances may be shown under 1-14 days time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under over 1-3 years time bucket and the remaining balances may be shown under 1-14 days time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under over 3-5 years time buckets (sub-standard) or over 5 years time bucket (doubtful)
controls.control_description:
Investments classified as NPAs should be shown under over 3-5 years time buckets (sub-standard) or over 5 years time
bucket (doubtful).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under over 3-5 years time buckets (sub-standard) or over 5 years time bucket (doubtful)

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake a study of behavioural and seasonal pattern of availments based on outstandings and the core and volatile portion should be identified
controls.control_description:
Cash Credit / Overdraft (including TOD) and Demand Loan Component of Working Capital
Bank should undertake a study of behavioural and seasonal pattern of availments based on outstandings and the core and volatile portion should be identified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake a study of behavioural and seasonal pattern of availments based on outstandings and the core and volatile portion should be identified

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under over 1-3 year time bucket
controls.control_description: While the volatile portion could be shown in the near-term maturity time buckets, the core portion may be shown under over 1-3 year time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under over 1-3 year time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under respective maturity time buckets
controls.control_description: Term Loans Interim cash flows (instalments) should be shown under respective maturity time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under respective maturity time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in 1-14 days time bucket
controls.control_description:
Doubtful and Loss Over 5 years time bucket
Fixed Assets Over 5 years time bucket
Other Assets
The net debit balance may be shown in 1-14 days time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in 1-14 days time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in over 5 years time bucket
controls.control_description: Intangible assets and assets not representing cash receivables may be shown in over 5 years time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in over 5 years time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under relevant residual maturity time buckets within 12 months
controls.control_description: Banks should undertake a study of the behavioural and seasonal pattern of potential availments in the accounts and the amounts so arrived at may be shown under relevant residual maturity time buckets within 12 months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under relevant residual maturity time buckets within 12 months

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed across time buckets
controls.control_description:
1-14 days time bucket
Letters of Credit / Guarantees devolvement (outflow)
Based on past history, these should be distributed across time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed across time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under respective maturity buckets
controls.control_description:
Liability on account of event cash flows, i.e., short fall in CRR / SLR balance on reporting Fridays, wage settlement, capital
expenditure, etc., which are known to the banks and any other contingency may be shown under respective maturity
buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under respective maturity buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in the 1-14 days time bucket
controls.control_description: All overdue liabilities should be placed in the 1-14 days time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in the 1-14 days time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in over 3-6 months time bucket
controls.control_description:
Interest and instalments from advances and investments, which are overdue for less than one month may be placed in over
3-6 months time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in over 3-6 months time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in over 6-12 months time bucket if the earlier receivables remain uncollected
controls.control_description:
Further, interest and instalments due (before classification as NPAs) may be placed in over 6-12
months time bucket if the earlier receivables remain uncollected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in over 6-12 months time bucket if the earlier receivables remain uncollected

controls.control_objective: To ensure show by way of a foot note as to how it proposes to finance the gap to bring the mismatch within the prescribed limits
controls.control_description:
Financing of Gap:
In case the negative gap exceeds the prudential limit of 20% of outflows, (1-14 days and 15-28 days time buckets) the bank shall
show by way of a foot note as to how it proposes to finance the gap to bring the mismatch within the prescribed limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to show by way of a foot note as to how it proposes to finance the gap to bring the mismatch within the prescribed limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included in over 3-6 months time bucket
controls.control_description: This should be included in over 3-6 months time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included in over 3-6 months time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in non-sensitive bucket
controls.control_description: The non-interest-paying portion may be shown in non-sensitive bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in non-sensitive bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to different time buckets on the basis of remaining term to maturity
controls.control_description: The amounts should be distributed to different time buckets on the basis of remaining term to maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to different time buckets on the basis of remaining term to maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to different time buckets on the basis of remaining maturity
controls.control_description: The amounts should be distributed to different time buckets on the basis of remaining maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to different time buckets on the basis of remaining maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to the appropriate time bucket that refers to the resetting date
controls.control_description: The amounts should be distributed to the appropriate time bucket that refers to the resetting date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to the appropriate time bucket that refers to the resetting date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to the respective maturity time bucket
controls.control_description: The amounts should be distributed to the respective maturity time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to the respective maturity time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to the respective maturity buckets
controls.control_description: 11 Repos / Bills Re-discounted (DUPN) Sensitive reprices only on maturity and should be distributed to the respective maturity buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to the respective maturity buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in over 3-6 months time bucket
controls.control_description: Balances with RBI Interest earning portion may be shown in over 3-6 months time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in over 3-6 months time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to the respective maturity buckets
controls.control_description: The amounts should be distributed to the respective maturity buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to the respective maturity buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under over 3-6 months time bucket
controls.control_description: may be shown under over 3-6 months time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under over 3-6 months time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be suitably classified as and when introduced
controls.control_description: (i) Other (i) Should be suitably classified as and when introduced.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be suitably classified as and when introduced
